## Plan Summary

**Bug:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7.

```typescript
// Current (buggy) — stops one iteration before the last element
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// Fix — iterates through all elements including the last
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

**Impact of the bug:**
| Input | Current output | Expected output |
|---|---|---|
| `["test"]` | `[]` | `["TEST"]` |
| `["a", "b"]` | `["A"]` | `["A", "B"]` |
| `["hello", "world", "foo"]` | `["HELLO", "WORLD"]` | `["HELLO", "WORLD", "FOO"]` |
| `[]` | `[]` ✅ | `[]` |

**Scope:** Single one-character change in `src/utils.ts`. No other files need to be modified — `processItems` has no callers outside the test suite.

**Verification:** `npm test` → all 4 tests in `tests/utils.test.ts` should pass.
